title: Get Started | InstantMed
bodyText: You're back online Skip to main content Your hair loss pattern Step 2 of 7 Which pattern looks closest? Choose the closest match. It does not need to be perfect. Which pattern best describes your hair loss? * No noticeable loss Minimal Slight recession at temples Mild Noticeable thinning / recession Moderate Crown thinning + hairline recession Notable Significant overall thinning Advanced Extensive loss Significant Continue
